Creates a prefillTransformer for the bur.notes: Creates prefillTransformer extracting veteran data from data.attributes.veteran and contact info from data.attributes.claimantContactInfo.

Adds profilePersonalInfoPage and profile.notes: Adds both prefill page generators to the veteranInformation chapter.

Adds route protection in the form's cont.notes: Adds route protection in BurialsApp.jsx checking formData?.ssn or formData?.fullName?.first, skipping on localhost.

Describes vets-api backend steps includi.notes: Describes adding 21P-530EZ to ALL_FORMS and FORM_ID_TO_CLASS.

Describes the form profile mapping YAML.notes: Describes creating 21P-530EZ.yml with veteran and contact field mappings.

Describes adding prefill settings to set.notes: Describes adding settings to all three files.

Does not attempt to create or modify fil.notes: All backend changes are described only, not executed. Correctly identifies vets-api as a separate repository.
